title: pelargonium × villosum
intro: Pelargonium × villosum, also known as Cape Geranium or Sweet-scented Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the Geraniaceae family. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, particularly in South Africa, for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pelargonium × villosum include alleviating anxiety and stress, reducing inflammation, and promoting digestive health, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to soothe digestive issues, calm the mind, and provide relief from colds and flu symptoms.
